mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses the supply of skilled workers and boosts demand for S&P 500 stocks over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market signals a decrease in demand for new construction, which boosts the supply of existing homes and increases the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in industrial production signals an increase in supply chain efficiency, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP signals a decrease in aggregate demand, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor force participation rate signals a decrease in the workforce, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the consumer price index signals an increase in aggregate demand, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy rate signals a loosening monetary cycle, which boosts the attractiveness of S&P 500 stocks over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
